parts.description: Turret AI: when a target tag is within range, fire a projectile at it on a cooldown. The aiming counterpart to the player-driven shoot.

targetTag.description: Tag of entities to fire at.

parts.description: Pursue the nearest entity of a target tag in full 2D, with optional axis lock and acceleration. Generalizes the SDK follow-entity-axis primitive. One of the four reuse-proof parts.

targetTag.description: Tag of the entity to pursue.

stopDistance.description: Center distance within which it holds still.

accel.description: Optional approach acceleration in px/sec² (0 = snap).

parts.description: Flee from the nearest entity of a threat tag — the mirror of ai-chase — panicking only within an optional radius. Sets velocity for a following velocity integrator.

threatTag.description: Tag of the entity to flee from.

panicDistance.description: Only flee when the threat is within this distance (0 = always).

parts.description: Patrol between waypoints with dwell time at each, ping-pong or loop — the guard/sentry pattern. Sets velocity for a following velocity integrator.

points.description: Array of { x, y } patrol waypoints (structural).

waitTime.description: Dwell time at each waypoint in seconds.

pingPong.description: Reverse at the ends instead of looping.

arriveRadius.description: Distance at which a waypoint is reached (structural).

parts.description: Drift in a heading that re-randomizes periodically, turning away from world edges; deterministic via world.rng. Sets velocity for a following velocity integrator.

edgePadding.description: Distance from a wall at which it turns inward (structural).

parts.description: Force a constant velocity each tick, optionally wrapping back to the opposite edge — scrolling worlds/tiles or auto-advancing scroller obstacles. Sets velocity for a following velocity integrator.

vx.description: Constant horizontal scroll velocity in px/sec.

vy.description: Constant vertical scroll velocity in px/sec.

wrap.description: Re-enter from the opposite edge on exit.

parts.description: A pickup consumed when a collector tag touches it, crediting a score and/or grant key and emitting a collect event. Coins, gems, power-ups, keys.

collectorTag.description: Tag of the entity that can collect.

scoreKey.description: Optional world.state score key to credit.

grantKey.description: Optional second world.state key to credit.

kind.description: Item label included in the event.

parts.description: Deal damage to overlapping entities of a target tag, with per-target cooldown, optional knockback and self-destruct. One of the four reuse-proof parts.

cooldown.description: Seconds before re-hitting the same target (0 = every tick).

knockback.description: Impulse applied to the victim away from this entity.

selfDestruct.description: Destroy this entity after a successful hit.

sound.description: Sound key on a successful hit.

parts.description: Travel an ordered list of waypoints, advancing on arrival; loops or stops at the end. Sets velocity for a following velocity integrator.

points.description: Array of { x, y } waypoints (structural geometry).

arriveRadius.description: Distance at which a waypoint is reached (structural).

loop.description: Restart from the first point at the end.

parts.description: Own an entity's hit points and death: seed hp, count an optional lifespan down, then emit a death event, tally a score key, and destroy. One of the four reuse-proof parts.

hp.description: Starting hit points (only if state.hp unset).

lifespan.description: Seconds to live before dying of old age (0 = no limit).

tallyKey.description: Optional world.state key incremented on death.

parts.description: On a cooldown'd key press, spawn a short-lived hitbox entity in the facing direction. Damage and despawn reuse contact-damage + health-and-death lifespan.

hitbox.description: Entity-definition for the transient strike volume.

attackKeys.description: Key codes that trigger a swing.

reach.description: { x, y } hitbox offset from center (structural).

faceVelocity.description: Place the hitbox in the movement direction.

parts.description: Four-directional keyboard movement (arrows + WASD). Sets velocity for a following velocity integrator.

normalizeDiagonal.description: Scale diagonal speed to match cardinals.

parts.description: Discrete grid-stepping movement on a fixed cadence; continuous (Snake) or step-per-press (Sokoban). Writes position directly — no velocity integrator needed.

snap.description: Snap to the tile grid each step.

parts.description: Side-scrolling locomotion: horizontal run, gravity, jump, and coyote-time. Sets velocity for a following velocity integrator.

jumpSpeed.description: Upward jump launch velocity in px/sec.

maxFall.description: Terminal fall speed in px/sec (0 = uncapped).

parts.description: Top-down movement with normalized 8-direction keys and optional move-toward-pointer steering. Sets velocity for a following velocity integrator.

pointerFollow.description: Steer toward the active pointer when no key is held.

parts.description: Teleport entities of a tag to a fixed point or a paired exit entity on contact, with a per-entrant cooldown to prevent bounce-back.

tag.description: Tag of entities that can use the portal.

to.description: { x, y } destination (structural; used when targetId unset).

targetId.description: Id of an entity whose position is the destination.

cooldown.description: Seconds before the same entity can teleport again.

parts.description: Fire projectiles on a cooldown — on key press or automatically — in a fixed direction or aimed at a tag. Spawns a clone of the projectile definition.

projectile.description: Entity-definition to spawn as the projectile.

fireKeys.description: Key codes that trigger a shot.

direction.description: { x, y } launch vector when not aiming (structural).

aimTag.description: Aim at nearest entity with this tag.

parts.description: A volume that emits enter/exit events for a tag, can set a world.state flag while occupied, and can destroy entrants (hazard / kill-plane).

tag.description: Tag of entities that activate the zone.

setStateKey.description: Optional world.state boolean key, true while occupied.

once.description: Fire only the first time, then go inert.

parts.description: A currency balance with optional passive income and a cap. Seeds the balance, accrues per second, and clamps. Other parts earn and spend against the key.
Advance a level/difficulty counter on a score threshold or when a tracked tag is fully cleared, emitting a level-up event. Manages the counter, not scene loading.

levelKey.description: world.state key holding the current level (1-based).

scoreKey.description: Score key to read in scoreGte mode.

threshold.description: Score for the first level-up in scoreGte mode.

clearTag.description: Tag whose disappearance triggers a level-up.

maxLevel.description: Stop advancing past this level, 0 = endless.

parts.description: Lives + respawn loop: seed lives, watch the player tag for death, spend a life and respawn a prototype after a delay, end the game when lives run out.

watchTag.description: Tag of the entity whose death costs a life.

stateKey.description: world.state scratch key for this system.

parts.description: Track the score and persist a high score via the SDK storage API (never raw localStorage), keeping the high-score key at the running maximum.

storageKey.description: Persistence key under the game's storage namespace.

persist.description: Write the high score to storage.

parts.description: Maintain a keyed item inventory on world.state: ensure it exists, clamp counts to capacity, and emit item-gained/item-lost events on change.

inventoryKey.description: world.state key holding the inventory record.

stateKey.description: world.state scratch key for change detection.

parts.description: A countdown clock that ends the game with a win or lose outcome at zero, pausable via a world.state flag. Survive-the-clock or beat-the-clock.

timeKey.description: world.state key holding the remaining time.

pauseKey.description: world.state key that pauses the timer while truthy.

parts.description: A purchasable upgrade tree driven by a request flag: spend currency, bump the owned level, apply an effect to a world.state key, with cost growth and prerequisites. All costs/effects are $cfg-driven.

upgrades.description: Array of { id, cost, effectKey?, effectAmount?, maxLevel?, costGrowth?, requires? }; cost/effectAmount/maxLevel/costGrowth are $cfg values.

levelsKey.description: world.state record of upgradeId → owned levels.

requestKey.description: world.state key holding a pending buy request.

parts.description: Spawn entities in escalating waves over time from a prototype definition, with per-wave growth, max-alive cap, and spawn points. One of the four reuse-proof parts.

interval.description: Seconds between individual spawns within a wave.

waveSizeGrowth.description: Added to waveSize each subsequent wave.

maxAlive.description: Cap on concurrent countTag entities, 0 = uncapped.

countTag.description: Tag counted for maxAlive and wave-clear detection.

spawnPoints.description: Array of { x, y } spawn positions, round-robin (structural).

advanceOnClear.description: Start the next wave when all countTag are gone.

stateKey.description: world.state scratch key for this spawner.

waveKey.description: world.state key exposing the current wave number.

parts.description: Generalized end-of-game check: a list of conditions with gte/lte/eq comparisons and per-condition win or lose outcomes. The first match ends the game.

conditions.description: Array of { key, cmp?, value, outcome?, winner?, sound? }; each value is a $cfg threshold.
